requirement_topic.en: Tajikstandart Conformity Certification — Mandatory Domestic Route (NOT EAC/TR CU)
requirement_topic.zh: Tajikstandart合格评定认证——强制性国内路径（非EAC/TR CU）
requirement_topic.zht: Tajikstandart合格評定認證——強制性國內路徑（非EAC/TR CU）

summary.en: Tajikistan's national conformity system is administered by Tajikstandart (the Agency for Standardization, Metrology, Certification and Trade Inspection). Electrical and energy equipment sold or installed in Tajikistan must obtain Tajikstandart conformity certification (a Tajikistan Certificate of Conformity or Declaration of Conformity under the national system). CRITICAL DISTINCTION: Tajikistan is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU) — it holds observer/candidate status only. EAC marking (issued under EAEU Technical Regulations / TR CU) does NOT by itself authorise market access in Tajikistan. Exporters who hold EAC certificates obtained for Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Armenia, or Russia cannot rely on those certificates for Tajikistan market access. The applicable conformity route is domestic Tajikstandart certification, referencing Tajik national standards (ST RT) or adopted GOST/IEC standards. Requirements for specific inverter power classes should be confirmed directly with Tajikstandart before shipment.
summary.zh: 塔吉克斯坦的国家合格评定体系由Tajikstandart（标准化、计量、认证和贸易检验局）管理。在塔吉克斯坦销售或安装的电气和能源设备须取得Tajikstandart合格评定认证（国家体系下的塔吉克斯坦合格证书或合格声明）。关键区别：塔吉克斯坦非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员——其仅具有观察员/候选国身份。EAC标志（依据EAEU技术法规/TR CU颁发）本身不授权在塔吉克斯坦进入市场。持有针对哈萨克斯坦、吉尔吉斯斯坦、亚美尼亚或俄罗斯颁发的EAC证书的出口商，不得依赖这些证书用于塔吉克斯坦市场准入。适用的合格评定路径是国内Tajikstandart认证，引用塔吉克国家标准（ST RT）或采纳的GOST/IEC标准。特定逆变器功率等级要求应在出货前直接向Tajikstandart确认。
summary.zht: 塔吉克斯坦的國家合格評定體系由Tajikstandart（標準化、計量、認證和貿易檢驗局）管理。在塔吉克斯坦銷售或安裝的電氣和能源設備須取得Tajikstandart合格評定認證（國家體系下的塔吉克斯坦合格證書或合格聲明）。關鍵區別：塔吉克斯坦非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員——其僅具有觀察員/候選國身份。EAC標誌（依據EAEU技術法規/TR CU頒發）本身不授權在塔吉克斯坦進入市場。持有針對哈薩克斯坦、吉爾吉斯斯坦、亞美尼亞或俄羅斯頒發的EAC證書的出口商，不得依賴這些證書用於塔吉克斯坦市場准入。適用的合格評定路徑是國內Tajikstandart認證，引用塔吉克國家標準（ST RT）或採納的GOST/IEC標準。特定逆變器功率等級要求應在出貨前直接向Tajikstandart確認。

standards_or_laws: Tajikstandart (Agency for Standardization, Metrology, Certification and Trade Inspection) — national conformity certification authority
ST RT (Tajik national standards) — aligned with GOST/IEC series
Law of the Republic of Tajikistan on Standardization and Law on Conformity Assessment — legal basis for certification
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 — safety standards referenced in GOST/IEC-aligned Tajik technical requirements for PV inverters
IEC 62116 — anti-islanding test procedure (GOST/IEC-aligned, referenced in grid-connection requirements)

summary.en: China's PV inverter conformity evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) and voluntary CQC/CGC certification. Chinese GB national standards and CQC/CGC voluntary certificates are issued under China's national conformity framework and are not recognised by Tajikstandart as substitutes for domestic conformity certification. There is no mutual recognition agreement between China and Tajikstandart that would allow Chinese GB-based certificates to substitute for Tajikstandart conformity documents. EAC certificates held by Chinese manufacturers for EAEU markets (Russia, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Armenia) also do not cover Tajikistan.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器合格评定证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）和自愿性CQC/CGC认证。中国GB国家标准和CQC/CGC自愿性证书在中国国家合格评定框架下颁发，不被Tajikstandart认可为国内合格评定认证的替代依据。中国与Tajikstandart之间不存在相互认可协议，允许基于中国GB的证书替代Tajikstandart合格评定文件。中国制造商为EAEU市场（俄罗斯、哈萨克斯坦、吉尔吉斯斯坦、亚美尼亚）持有的EAC证书同样不覆盖塔吉克斯坦。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器合格評定證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）和自願性CQC/CGC認證。中國GB國家標準和CQC/CGC自願性證書在中國國家合格評定框架下頒發，不被Tajikstandart認可為國內合格評定認證的替代依據。中國與Tajikstandart之間不存在相互認可協議，允許基於中國GB的證書替代Tajikstandart合格評定文件。中國製造商為EAEU市場（俄羅斯、哈薩克斯坦、吉爾吉斯斯坦、亞美尼亞）持有的EAC證書同樣不覆蓋塔吉克斯坦。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T certificates and any EAC/TR CU certificates do not satisfy Tajikstandart conformity requirements. The mandatory route for Tajikistan is domestic Tajikstandart certification referencing Tajik national standards (ST RT) or adopted GOST/IEC standards. Exporters should: (a) confirm with Tajikstandart which product categories and standards apply to the specific inverter model and power class; (b) obtain Tajikstandart Certificate of Conformity or Declaration of Conformity via an accredited Tajik certification body; (c) prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 and IEC 62116 test evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratories to support the Tajikstandart application. Do NOT assume EAC certificates obtained for EAEU markets transfer to Tajikistan — they do not.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T证书和任何EAC/TR CU证书不满足Tajikstandart合格评定要求。塔吉克斯坦的强制路径是引用塔吉克国家标准（ST RT）或采纳的GOST/IEC标准的国内Tajikstandart认证。出口商应：（a）向Tajikstandart确认适用于特定逆变器型号和功率等级的产品类别和标准；（b）通过塔吉克认可认证机构取得Tajikstandart合格证书或合格声明；（c）准备来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2和IEC 62116测试证据以支持Tajikstandart申请。切勿假设为EAEU市场取得的EAC证书可转移至塔吉克斯坦——事实上不可转移。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T證書和任何EAC/TR CU證書不滿足Tajikstandart合格評定要求。塔吉克斯坦的強制路徑是引用塔吉克國家標準（ST RT）或採納的GOST/IEC標準的國內Tajikstandart認證。出口商應：（a）向Tajikstandart確認適用於特定逆變器型號和功率等級的產品類別和標準；（b）通過塔吉克認可認證機構取得Tajikstandart合格證書或合格聲明；（c）準備來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2和IEC 62116測試證據以支持Tajikstandart申請。切勿假設為EAEU市場取得的EAC證書可轉移至塔吉克斯坦——事實上不可轉移。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Tajikstandart conformity certification is required for electrical equipment placed on the Tajikistan market; EAC/TR CU marking is not a valid substitute as Tajikistan is not an EAEU member
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T and CQC/CGC certificates are issued under China's national framework and carry no presumption of conformity in Tajikistan

source.publisher: Tajikstandart — Agency for Standardization, Metrology, Certification and Trade Inspection of the Republic of Tajikistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tajikistan is NOT an EAEU member. EAC/TR CU certificates do not by themselves authorise market access in Tajikistan. The mandatory route is Tajikstandart domestic conformity certification. Chinese GB/T certificates alone do not satisfy Tajikstandart requirements. Confirm applicable product scope, standards, and certification body requirements directly with Tajikstandart before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成员。EAC/TR CU证书本身不授权在塔吉克斯坦进入市场。强制路径为Tajikstandart国内合格评定认证。单凭中国GB/T证书不满足Tajikstandart要求。出货前请直接向Tajikstandart确认适用产品范围、标准和认证机构要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成員。EAC/TR CU證書本身不授權在塔吉克斯坦進入市場。強制路徑為Tajikstandart國內合格評定認證。單憑中國GB/T證書不滿足Tajikstandart要求。出貨前請直接向Tajikstandart確認適用產品範圍、標準和認證機構要求。

requirement_topic.en: Barqi Tojik Grid-Connection and Anti-Islanding — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, 50 Hz / 220/380 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: Barqi Tojik并网与防孤岛——IEC 62116、IEC 61727、50 Hz / 220/380 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: Barqi Tojik併網與防孤島——IEC 62116、IEC 61727、50 Hz / 220/380 V參數

summary.en: Barqi Tojik (Tajikistan's state vertically-integrated electricity utility, operating under the Ministry of Energy and Water Resources) sets grid-connection technical requirements for distributed and utility-scale solar PV inverters. Tajikistan's electricity grid operates at 50 Hz, 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase — the same nominal voltage as China's GB/T 156 grid, but grid stability, voltage tolerance, and protection relay settings must be validated against Barqi Tojik's actual operating conditions rather than Chinese grid parameters. Key grid-connection requirements applied in Barqi Tojik and donor/lender (World Bank, ADB) project specifications include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within 2 seconds; (2) IEC 61727 (Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface) for grid interface performance; (3) firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays validated against Tajikistan's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid and actual Barqi Tojik operating conditions; (4) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission limits. Utility-scale and donor-financed projects may also require Low Voltage Ride-Through (LVRT) evidence per IEC TS 62910 or lender technical specifications.
summary.zh: Barqi Tojik（塔吉克斯坦国家垂直一体化电力公用事业，隶属能源和水资源部）规定了分布式和公用事业规模太阳能光伏逆变器的并网技术要求。塔吉克斯坦电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相220 V、三相380 V——与中国GB/T 156电网名义电压相同，但电网稳定性、电压容差及保护继电器整定须依据Barqi Tojik实际运行条件进行验证，而非中国电网参数。Barqi Tojik及援助方/贷款方（世界银行、亚开行）项目规格中适用的主要并网要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛测试——逆变器须在2秒内检测电网失电并断开；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系统——电网接口特性）用于电网接口性能；（3）针对塔吉克斯坦50 Hz、220/380 V电网及Barqi Tojik实际运行条件验证固件保护阈值和重连延迟；（4）IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放限值。公用事业规模和援助方资助项目还可能要求符合IEC TS 62910或贷款方技术规格的低电压穿越（LVRT）证据。
summary.zht: Barqi Tojik（塔吉克斯坦國家垂直一體化電力公用事業，隸屬能源和水資源部）規定了分散式和公用事業規模太陽能光伏逆變器的併網技術要求。塔吉克斯坦電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相220 V、三相380 V——與中國GB/T 156電網名義電壓相同，但電網穩定性、電壓容差及保護繼電器整定須依據Barqi Tojik實際運行條件進行驗證，而非中國電網參數。Barqi Tojik及援助方/貸款方（世界銀行、亞開行）項目規格中適用的主要併網要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島測試——逆變器須在2秒內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系統——電網接口特性）用於電網接口性能；（3）針對塔吉克斯坦50 Hz、220/380 V電網及Barqi Tojik實際運行條件驗證韌體保護閾值和重連延遲；（4）IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放限值。公用事業規模和援助方資助項目還可能要求符合IEC TS 62910或貸款方技術規格的低電壓穿越（LVRT）證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC TS 62910 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure for low-voltage ride-through measurements
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
Barqi Tojik (Open Joint Stock Holding Company Barqi Tojik) — grid-connection technical requirements
Ministry of Energy and Water Resources of the Republic of Tajikistan — energy sector oversight

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004-2018 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results under GB/T 37408. While China's grid nominal voltage is 220/380 V at 50 Hz — the same as Tajikistan's nominal parameters — the grid stability conditions, voltage tolerance bands, and protection relay settings applicable under Chinese grid operator rules do not automatically transfer to Barqi Tojik's grid-connection requirements. Chinese grid-connection documents do not satisfy Barqi Tojik or donor/lender technical requirements without supplementary IEC evidence.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004-2018（逆变器技术规范）及GB/T 37408下的国内防孤岛测试结果。尽管中国电网名义电压与塔吉克斯坦名义参数相同（50 Hz 220/380 V），但中国电网运营商规则下适用的电网稳定性条件、电压容差范围和保护继电器整定不自动转移至Barqi Tojik的并网要求。中国并网文件在没有补充IEC证据的情况下，不满足Barqi Tojik或援助方/贷款方技术要求。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004-2018（逆變器技術規範）及GB/T 37408下的國內防孤島測試結果。儘管中國電網名義電壓與塔吉克斯坦名義參數相同（50 Hz 220/380 V），但中國電網運營商規則下適用的電網穩定性條件、電壓容差範圍和保護繼電器整定不自動轉移至Barqi Tojik的併網要求。中國併網文件在沒有補充IEC證據的情況下，不滿足Barqi Tojik或援助方/貸款方技術要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages — China: 220/380 V, 50 Hz)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: While Tajikistan shares China's 50 Hz / 220/380 V nominal voltage, Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy Barqi Tojik or donor/lender requirements. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 grid interface compliance evidence; (c) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic emission compliance evidence; (d) for utility-scale and donor-financed projects: IEC TS 62910 LVRT evidence or evidence per lender technical specification. Firmware protection thresholds must be validated for Barqi Tojik's actual grid stability conditions — which may differ from Chinese grid operator conditions despite the same nominal voltage. Additionally, high-altitude sites in Tajikistan (commonly 1,000–3,000 m) require altitude derating documentation per IEC 62109-1 and manufacturer specifications.
gap.zh: 差距：尽管塔吉克斯坦与中国共享50 Hz / 220/380 V名义电压，但中国GB/T并网文件不满足Barqi Tojik或援助方/贷款方要求。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 61727电网接口合规证据；（c）IEC 61000-3-2谐波排放合规证据；（d）对于公用事业规模和援助方资助项目：IEC TS 62910 LVRT证据或符合贷款方技术规格的证据。固件保护阈值须针对Barqi Tojik实际电网稳定性条件进行验证——尽管名义电压相同，实际条件可能与中国电网运营商条件不同。此外，塔吉克斯坦高海拔场地（通常1,000–3,000 m）须根据IEC 62109-1及制造商规格提供高海拔降额文件。
gap.zht: 差距：儘管塔吉克斯坦與中國共享50 Hz / 220/380 V名義電壓，但中國GB/T併網文件不滿足Barqi Tojik或援助方/貸款方要求。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 61727電網接口合規證據；（c）IEC 61000-3-2諧波排放合規證據；（d）對於公用事業規模和援助方資助項目：IEC TS 62910 LVRT證據或符合貸款方技術規格的證據。韌體保護閾值須針對Barqi Tojik實際電網穩定性條件進行驗證——儘管名義電壓相同，實際條件可能與中國電網運營商條件不同。此外，塔吉克斯坦高海拔場地（通常1,000–3,000 m）須根據IEC 62109-1及製造商規格提供高海拔降額文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection under Barqi Tojik requirements; anti-islanding (IEC 62116) and harmonic compliance (IEC 61000-3-2) are non-negotiable technical gates for donor/lender-financed projects; high-altitude derating documentation required for mountainous sites
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not transfer to Barqi Tojik or donor/lender project acceptance in Tajikistan

source.publisher: OJSHC Barqi Tojik (state electricity utility of the Republic of Tajikistan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Barqi Tojik grid-connection and donor/lender specifications require IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence not covered by Chinese GB/T certificates. Despite sharing 50 Hz / 220/380 V nominal voltage with China, firmware and protection settings must be validated for Barqi Tojik actual grid conditions. Altitude derating is a material compliance item for Tajikistan's high-altitude mountain terrain. Verify current Barqi Tojik connection requirements and applicable donor/lender technical specifications directly with the project owner or Barqi Tojik before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] Barqi Tojik并网及援助方/贷款方规格要求IEC 62116、IEC 61727和IEC 61000-3-2证据——上述均未被中国GB/T证书覆盖。尽管与中国共享50 Hz / 220/380 V名义电压，固件和保护参数仍须针对Barqi Tojik实际电网条件进行验证。高海拔降额是塔吉克斯坦高海拔山地地形的重要合规事项。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向项目业主或Barqi Tojik核实当前并网要求及适用的援助方/贷款方技术规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] Barqi Tojik併網及援助方/貸款方規格要求IEC 62116、IEC 61727和IEC 61000-3-2證據——上述均未被中國GB/T證書覆蓋。儘管與中國共享50 Hz / 220/380 V名義電壓，韌體和保護參數仍須針對Barqi Tojik實際電網條件進行驗證。高海拔降額是塔吉克斯坦高海拔山地地形的重要合規事項。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向項目業主或Barqi Tojik核實當前併網要求及適用的援助方/貸款方技術規格。
